description: tfaforms.com is the hosted domain used by FormAssembly to serve web forms and account login pages. FormAssembly is a form-building and secure data collection platform.
summary: tfaforms.com exposes public hosted FormAssembly form endpoints on `https://www.tfaforms.com/{form_id}`; no developer-facing API/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surface on tfaforms.com itself was found.
